name: SΔϕ-71 — Cost Attribution Redesign: Low-Cost Transition, Asymmetric Cost Burden, Binding Fiction, and AI Inclusion (v1.0, AI-Readable Package)
description: SΔϕ-71 formalizes Cost Attribution Redesign as a diagnostic and constructive process for reducing transition cost without hiding that cost in specific actors, groups, systems, or environments. It introduces low-cost transition, asymmetric cost burden, TCC relativity, Binding Fiction and Editing Fiction requirements, and the AI inclusion condition under unsettled subjecthood.
